# Box Open Elements

> A framework-agnostic Web Components design system and component library for Box-style experiences. Headless, token-themeable, and conformant with box-ui-elements. Published to npm as `@unofficialbox/box-open-elements`.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/unofficialbox/box-open-elements/blob/main/README.md): overview, install, and the import contract
- [Architecture](https://github.com/unofficialbox/box-open-elements/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): layers, headless-first design, transport boundary, render contract
- [API Guidelines](https://github.com/unofficialbox/box-open-elements/blob/main/docs/api-guidelines.md): shared attribute/event/schema vocabulary
- [Taxonomy](https://github.com/unofficialbox/box-open-elements/blob/main/docs/taxonomy.md): the Foundations → Components → Patterns model
- [Components Catalog](https://github.com/unofficialbox/box-open-elements/blob/main/docs/components/catalog.md): the component inventory
- [Patterns Catalog](https://github.com/unofficialbox/box-open-elements/blob/main/docs/patterns/catalog.md): the pattern inventory
- [Design Tokens](https://github.com/unofficialbox/box-open-elements/blob/main/docs/foundations/tokens.md): token registry and theming

## Install

- npm: `npm i @unofficialbox/box-open-elements`
- Docs site: https://unofficialbox.github.io/box-open-elements
